data.name: Login.Subheading
data.value: Fill in your login credentials to proceed.

data.name: Login.WithPasskey
data.comment: Button label; a key emoji is rendered before it by the component, not part of this string.

data.name: Login.NoAccountPrompt
data.comment: Followed by the Login.CreateAccount link. Kept as a separate string so translations can put the link where their grammar needs it.

data.name: Login.NoEmailPrompt
data.comment: Followed by the Login.ResendConfirmation link.

data.name: LoginForm.InvalidLoginAttempt
data.comment: Deliberately identical whether the email is unknown, the account can't sign in, it's locked out, or the password is wrong — user enumeration (CWE-208) requires one message for all of them. Used at three call sites in LoginForm.razor via this single key; do not give any of them a more specific translation.

data.name: Register.Subheading
data.value: Create your account to get started.

data.name: Register.EmailInvalid
data.value: Please enter a valid email address

data.name: Register.PasswordLength
data.value: Password must be between 12 and 100 characters

data.name: Register.HaveAccountPrompt
data.comment: Followed by the Register.LogIn link.

data.name: Register.CreationFailedDetail
data.value: Error on creating a new account: {0}
data.comment: {0} is the joined IdentityResult error descriptions (e.g. "Email 'x' is already taken.").

data.name: AcceptInvitation.SubheadingPrefix
data.comment: Followed by the invitee's email (rendered in a <strong>) and AcceptInvitation.SubheadingSuffix.

data.name: AcceptInvitation.SubheadingSuffix
data.value: to finish setting up your account.
data.comment: Preceded by the invitee's email; see AcceptInvitation.SubheadingPrefix.

data.name: AcceptInvitation.InvalidLink
data.value: This invitation link is invalid or has expired. Ask your administrator to send a new one.

data.name: AcceptInvitation.PasswordLength
data.value: Password must be between {0} and 100 characters
data.comment: {0} is the configured minimum password length (IdentityOptions.Password.RequiredLength).

data.name: ConfirmEmail.Success
data.value: Thank you for confirming your email. You can now log in.

data.name: ConfirmEmail.GenericError
data.value: An error occurred confirming your email.

data.name: ConfirmEmail.UserNotFoundError
data.value: Error confirming your email. The link may be invalid or expired.

data.name: ConfirmEmail.ConfirmFailedError
data.value: Error confirming your email. The link may have expired.

data.name: ConfirmEmailChange.Success
data.value: Thank you for confirming your email change. Your email has been updated.

data.name: ConfirmEmailChange.GenericError
data.value: An error occurred confirming your email change.

data.name: ConfirmEmailChange.InvalidLink
data.comment: Used at two call sites: missing query parameters and an unknown user id.

data.name: ConfirmEmailChange.ChangeFailedError
data.value: Error changing email. The link may have expired.

data.name: ForgotPassword.Subheading
data.value: We'll send a password reset link.

data.name: ForgotPassword.EmailInvalid
data.value: Please enter a valid email address

data.name: ForgotPasswordConfirmation.Detail
data.value: If an account with that email exists, a password reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.

data.name: InvalidPasswordReset.Detail
data.value: The password reset link is invalid.

data.name: InvalidUser.Detail
data.value: The user could not be loaded.

data.name: Lockout.Detail
data.value: This account has been locked out. Please try again later.

data.name: LoginWith2fa.Subheading
data.value: Enter the code from your authenticator app.

data.name: LoginWithRecoveryCode.Subheading
data.value: Use a recovery code to regain access.

data.name: RegisterConfirmation.Detail
data.value: Please check your email to confirm your account.

data.name: RegisterConfirmation.UserNotFoundError
data.value: Error finding user for the specified email.

data.name: ResendEmailConfirmation.Subheading
data.value: Enter your email and we'll send the confirmation link again.

data.name: ResendEmailConfirmation.EmailInvalid
data.value: Please enter a valid email address

data.name: ResendEmailConfirmation.EmailSentTitle
data.comment: Used at two call sites: unknown email (anti-enumeration) and a successfully resent confirmation.

data.name: ResendEmailConfirmation.EmailSentDetail
data.value: Verification email sent. Please check your email.
data.comment: Used at two call sites: unknown email (anti-enumeration) and a successfully resent confirmation.

data.name: ResetPassword.Subheading
data.value: Choose a new password for your account.

data.name: ResetPassword.InvalidLink
data.value: This password reset link is invalid. Please request a new one.

data.name: ResetPassword.EmailInvalid
data.value: Please enter a valid email address

data.name: ResetPassword.PasswordLength
data.value: Password must be between {0} and 100 characters
data.comment: {0} is the configured minimum password length (IdentityOptions.Password.RequiredLength).

data.name: ResetPasswordConfirmation.Detail
data.value: Your password has been reset successfully.

data.name: ChangePassword.PasswordLength
data.value: Password must be between {0} and 100 characters
data.comment: {0} is the configured minimum password length (IdentityOptions.Password.RequiredLength).

data.name: ChangePassword.ErrorTitle
data.comment: Shared across several error notifications on this page.

data.name: ChangePassword.SuccessDetail
data.value: Your password has been updated successfully.

data.name: ChangePassword.UnexpectedErrorDetail
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

data.name: DeletePersonalData.Subtitle
data.value: Deactivate your account and schedule your personal data for permanent erasure

data.name: DeletePersonalData.AlertTitle
data.value: Your data will be permanently erased.

data.name: DeletePersonalData.AlertBodyPrefix
data.value: Your account is deactivated immediately and you are signed out. Your personal data is then
data.comment: First fragment of a sentence that wraps a <strong> emphasis in the markup; continues in AlertBodyStrong/AlertBodySuffix.

data.name: DeletePersonalData.AlertBodySuffix
data.value: once the retention period elapses, after which it cannot be recovered. Until then, an administrator can still reverse the deletion.

data.name: DeletePersonalData.PasswordLabel
data.value: Enter your current password to confirm deletion

data.name: DeletePersonalData.PasswordRequired
data.value: Password is required to confirm deletion

data.name: DeletePersonalData.WarningText
data.value: After successful verification your account is deactivated immediately and your personal data is permanently erased once the retention period elapses.

data.name: DeletePersonalData.ErrorTitle
data.comment: Shared across several error notifications on this page.

data.name: DeletePersonalData.ConfirmMessage
data.value: Your account will be deactivated now and your personal data permanently erased after the retention period. Continue?

data.name: DeletePersonalData.WrongPasswordDetail
data.value: The password you entered is incorrect.

data.name: DeletePersonalData.CriticalErrorDetail
data.value: An unexpected error occurred during account deletion. The process was aborted.

data.name: Disable2fa.AlertKeysSuffix
data.value: change the keys used in your authenticator apps.

data.name: Disable2fa.AlertResetPrefix
data.value: If you want to change the authenticator key, please

data.name: Disable2fa.FooterHint
data.value: You can re-enable 2FA at any time from your security settings.

data.name: Disable2fa.ErrorTitle
data.comment: Shared across several error notifications on this page.

data.name: Disable2fa.DisabledDetail
data.value: Two-factor authentication is now turned off. You can re-enable it anytime by setting up an authenticator app.

data.name: Disable2fa.DisableFailedDetail
data.value: Could not disable 2FA. Please try again or contact support.

data.name: Email.Subtitle
data.value: Update or verify your email address

data.name: Email.NotConfirmedText
data.value: Your email is not yet confirmed.

data.name: Email.NewEmailInvalid
data.value: Please enter a valid email address

data.name: Email.NewEmailSameAsCurrent
data.value: New email must be different from current email

data.name: Email.ErrorTitle
data.comment: Shared across several error notifications on this page.

data.name: Email.ConfirmationSentDetail
data.value: A confirmation link has been sent to your new email address. Please check your inbox.

data.name: Email.SendFailedDetail
data.value: Failed to send confirmation email. Please try again later.

data.name: Email.ResentDetail
data.value: Verification email has been resent. Please check your inbox.

data.name: Email.VerificationSendFailedDetail
data.value: Could not send verification email. Try again later.

data.name: EnableAuthenticator.VerifiedTitle
data.comment: Shown as the page heading once recovery codes have been generated, and reused as the toast title for the same success event.

data.name: EnableAuthenticator.Subheading
data.value: Set up two-factor authentication using an authenticator app.

data.name: EnableAuthenticator.AndroidLinkText
data.comment: Platform name (unchanged in German); used at two call sites for the Microsoft/Google Authenticator links.

data.name: EnableAuthenticator.IosLinkText
data.comment: Platform name (unchanged in German); used at two call sites for the Microsoft/Google Authenticator links.

data.name: EnableAuthenticator.Step2TextPrefix
data.value: Scan the QR code below or enter the key

data.name: EnableAuthenticator.Step2TextSuffix
data.value: into your app. Spaces and casing do not matter.

data.name: EnableAuthenticator.Step3Text
data.value: Once you have scanned the QR code, your app will show a 6-digit code. Enter it below.

data.name: EnableAuthenticator.VerifiedDetail
data.value: Your authenticator app has been verified.
data.comment: Shared between the recovery-codes-generated and already-configured success notifications.

data.name: GenerateRecoveryCodes.AlertStrong
data.value: Put these codes in a safe place.

data.name: GenerateRecoveryCodes.AlertLine2
data.value: If you lose your device and don't have the recovery codes you will lose access to your account.

data.name: GenerateRecoveryCodes.AlertLine3Prefix
data.value: Generating new recovery codes does not change the keys used in authenticator apps. If you wish to change the key used in an authenticator app you should

data.name: GenerateRecoveryCodes.ErrorTitle
data.comment: Shared across several error notifications on this page.

data.name: GenerateRecoveryCodes.TwoFactorRequiredDetail
data.value: You must have 2FA enabled to generate recovery codes.

data.name: GenerateRecoveryCodes.GeneratedDetail
data.value: You have generated new recovery codes.

data.name: PasskeyCreate.Subheading
data.value: Add a secure, passwordless sign-in method using your device

data.name: PasskeyCreate.IntroText
data.value: A passkey allows you to sign in using your device's built-in security features (fingerprint, face recognition, PIN or security key) — no password needed.

data.name: PasskeyCreate.Step2
data.value: Follow your browser or device instructions

data.name: PasskeyCreate.Step3
data.value: Give your new passkey a name (you can change it later)

data.name: PasskeyCreate.SupportedDevicesText
data.value: Supported on Windows Hello, macOS Touch ID, Android biometrics, iOS Face ID / Touch ID, YubiKey and most FIDO2 security keys.

data.name: PasskeyCreate.ErrorTitle
data.comment: Shared between the profile-load and passkey-registration error notifications.

data.name: Passkeys.Subtitle
data.value: Add, rename or remove your security keys (WebAuthn / passkeys)

data.name: Passkeys.MaxReachedAlert
data.value: You have reached the maximum number of passkeys ({0}). Delete one before adding a new one.
data.comment: {0} is the configured maximum passkey count (MaxPasskeyCount).

data.name: Passkeys.EmptyText
data.value: Passkeys let you sign in without a password, using your device.

data.name: Passkeys.ErrorTitle
data.comment: Shared across several error notifications on this page.

data.name: Passkeys.DeleteConfirmItem
data.comment: {0} is the passkey's display name, rendered inside markdown bold in the confirm-delete dialog.

data.name: Profile.PhoneInvalid
data.value: Please enter a valid phone number

data.name: Profile.ErrorTitle
data.comment: Shared across several error notifications on this page.

data.name: Profile.UserNotFoundDetail
data.value: Could not load your profile. Please try again.

data.name: Profile.UnexpectedErrorDetail
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while saving.

data.name: RenamePasskey.Subtitle
data.value: Choose a recognizable name for this security key

data.name: RenamePasskey.NotFoundOrExpired
data.value: Passkey not found or session expired.

data.name: RenamePasskey.NamePlaceholder
data.value: e.g. My iPhone 15, Work Laptop Key, Blue YubiKey

data.name: RenamePasskey.CannotLoadProfileError
data.value: Cannot load user profile. Please sign in again.

data.name: RenamePasskey.NotFoundError
data.value: This passkey could not be found.

data.name: RenamePasskey.ErrorTitle
data.comment: Shared across several error notifications on this page.

data.name: ResetAuthenticator.Subheading
data.value: Remove current authenticator app and start setup again

data.name: ResetAuthenticator.AlertLine1
data.value: Resetting your authenticator key will make your current app stop working.

data.name: ResetAuthenticator.AlertLine2Prefix
data.value: You will need to set up your authenticator app again immediately after this step.

data.name: ResetAuthenticator.AlertLine2Strong
data.value: If you do not complete the setup, you may lose access to your account.

data.name: SetPassword.Subtitle
data.value: Add a local account so you can log in without an external login.

data.name: SetPassword.PasswordLength
data.value: Password must be between {0} and 100 characters
data.comment: {0} is the configured minimum password length (IdentityOptions.Password.RequiredLength).

data.name: SetPassword.ErrorTitle
data.comment: Shared across the two error notifications on this page.

data.name: PersonalData.Subheading
data.value: Download or delete the personal information associated with your account

data.name: PersonalData.IntroText
data.value: This page lets you download a copy of all personal data we store about you (profile information, activity logs, etc.) or permanently delete your account and all related data.

data.name: PersonalData.WarningPart1
data.value: Deleting your account deactivates it immediately and

data.name: PersonalData.WarningPart2Strong
data.value: permanently erases your personal data once the retention period elapses

data.name: PersonalData.WarningPart3
data.value: — including all content, settings and history. After erasure this

data.name: PersonalData.FooterHint
data.value: The downloaded file usually contains your data in JSON or ZIP format.

data.name: TwoFactorAuthentication.Subheading
data.value: Add an extra layer of security to your account

data.name: TwoFactorAuthentication.NoCodesStrong
data.value: You have no recovery codes left!

data.name: TwoFactorAuthentication.NoCodesText
data.value: Generate a new set before you can use recovery codes to log in.

data.name: TwoFactorAuthentication.GenerateCodesButton
data.comment: Shared between the "no codes left" and "codes running low" alerts.

data.name: TwoFactorAuthentication.RecoveryCodesRemainingSingular
data.comment: {0} is always 1 here; used only when exactly one recovery code remains.

data.name: TwoFactorAuthentication.RecoveryCodesRemainingPlural
data.comment: {0} is the number of recovery codes remaining (2 or 3 in this context).

data.name: TwoFactorAuthentication.ConsiderGeneratingText
data.value: Consider generating a new set soon.

data.name: TwoFactorAuthentication.AuthenticatorAppText
data.value: Use a time-based one-time password (TOTP) app such as Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, Bitwarden, 1Password, etc.

data.name: Users.Subtitle
data.value: Manage user accounts, roles, and access.

data.name: Users.Count
data.comment: {0} is the filtered count, {1} is the total count, e.g. "9 of 12".

data.name: Users.RestorePrompt
data.comment: {0} is the user's email address.

data.name: Roles.Count
data.comment: {0} is the filtered count, {1} is the total count, e.g. "9 of 12".

data.name: Roles.UsersInRoleDialogTitle
data.comment: {0} is the role name.

data.name: Roles.RestorePrompt
data.comment: {0} is the role name.

data.name: UserCleanup.Subtitle
data.value: Configure automatic permanent deletion of soft-deleted users.

data.name: UserCleanup.CronScheduleHint
data.value: Quartz cron format: seconds minutes hours day-of-month month day-of-week. Example: 0 0 3 * * ? runs daily at 03:00 UTC. Changes take effect immediately.

data.name: NewRole.CreateFailedDetail
data.comment: {0} is the joined list of error descriptions.

data.name: RoleUserDialog.RemoveConfirmMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove this user?

data.name: RoleUserDialog.RootUserCannotBeRemoved
data.value: User {0} cannot be removed from role {1}, because root user needs the role {2}
data.comment: {0} is the username, {1} is the role name being removed from, {2} is the Administrator role name (data, not translated).

data.name: UserRoleDialog.RootUserMustHaveAdminRole
data.comment: {0} is the Administrator role name (data, not translated).
